title: symphyotrichum lowrieanum
intro: Symphyotrichum lowrieanum, also known as Lowrie's aster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum lowrieanum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
